name: Cartalax
subtitle: Bioregulatory Tripeptide | Cartilage & Connective Tissue Support

modifications: Found in alpha-1 chain of type XI collagen
molecular.halfLife: Minutes (short peptide); effects persist via epigenetic changes

overview: Synthetic tripeptide developed by Professor Vladimir Khavinson, supporting cartilage, connective tissue, and cellular regeneration through proliferation markers and apoptosis pathway modulation.
mechanism: Modulates cell proliferation, suppresses apoptosis, affects fibroblast activity, reduces senescence markers, and influences extracellular matrix preservation.
keyBenefits: Established safety profile in Russian clinical practice

items.name: Osteoarthritis
items.description: Clinical efficacy shown in osteochondrosis, osteoarthritis, and osteoporosis treatment.

items.name: Degenerative Joint Disease Prevention
items.description: Supports cartilage maintenance and joint function.

items.name: Post-Fracture Recovery
items.description: Supports bone and connective tissue healing.

items.name: Fibroblast Activation
items.description: Increased Ki-67 expression with suppressed apoptosis in young and aged cells.

items.name: Collagen Production
items.description: Enhances collagen synthesis in connective tissue.

items.name: Cellular Senescence Reduction
items.description: Inhibited MMP-9 synthesis; maintained extracellular matrix integrity.

deliveryMethods.overview: Capsule form; do not chew, swallow whole with water during meals.
Daily subcutaneous injection for enhanced bioavailability.
Solution applied to face, neck, hands, or superficial joint areas.

interactions.notes: Complementary bioregulatory effects across organ systems.
May enhance synthesis while supplements provide raw materials.
Distinct action pathways; may complement effects.
Both affect tissue growth; monitor for excessive proliferation.

common: No reported side effects in Russian clinical use when taken properly
monitoring: Follow official Russian manufacturer timing guidelines
Take with meals for oral form

good: Professional Russian packaging with holographic seals
Exactly 0.1mg (100mcg) AC-4 peptide complex per capsule
bad: Missing holographic seals or professional packaging

references.title: Fibroblast Proliferation Study
references.keyFindings: Human skin fibroblasts; 72 hours at 20 nM. Increased Ki-67 expression with suppressed apoptosis in young and aged cells.

references.title: Kidney Cell Culture Research
references.keyFindings: Renal epithelial cells; 7 days. Reduced pro-apoptotic p53 expression in aging kidney cells.

references.title: Clinical Spine & Joint Study (Russia)
references.keyFindings: Human subjects; 1-3 months with 0.1mg capsules daily. Efficacy in osteochondrosis, osteoarthritis, and osteoporosis treatment.

references.title: Matrix Metalloproteinase Research
references.keyFindings: Fibroblast cultures; 5 days at 20 nM. Inhibited MMP-9 synthesis; maintained extracellular matrix integrity.

quickStats.frequency: 1-2 times daily with meals (oral) or once daily (injectable)
quickStats.storage: Oral capsules: room temperature; Injectable lyophilized: 2-8°C; Reconstituted: 2-8°C refrigerated
